history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A teenage boy with curly dark hair is taking a selfie in a bathroom. He is wearing a black hoodie with a graphic design on the front that includes the text "2-212 WORLD" and a circular emblem with the American flag. The hoodie has a zipper and a cross pendant hanging from it. He is also wearing light gray sweatpants and a backpack slung over his left shoulder. The background is a tiled wall and a dark door with a white handicap symbol depicting a person with a broom and dustpan. The lighting is somewhat dim, with a warm light source creating shadows and highlights. The overall mood is casual and youthful. The image is captured from a medium shot, focusing on the boy and his attire. The phone he is holding has a colorful, patterned case.
